app.name: Special Zone 6 Economic Initiative
app.tagline: Connecting Pa-O farmers directly with buyers — grow only what is already sold.

processing.title: From field to finished sack — konjac (ဝဥ)
processing.subtitle: Our cooperative runs the full konjac supply chain: terraced fields, fresh-tuber intake, washing and grading lines, sun-drying racks, and warehoused dried product ready for offtake.
processing.heroAlt: Konjac processing hall with stainless conveyor
processing.landingTitle: Inside the konjac (ဝဥ) processing plant
processing.landingSub: A new cooperative-run line that takes fresh tubers all the way to graded, dried, warehoused sacks.

landing.ctaBlurb: Committee, admin, and village representatives — sign in to post listings, demand, and prices.

for.farmersBody: Grow with confidence — every listing connects to a confirmed buyer.
for.buyersBody: Pre-order seasonal crops directly from cooperatives — no brokers.
for.committeeBody: Publish monthly reference prices and oversee fair trade.

home.inSeasonSub: Crops being harvested this month in the zone.
home.inSeasonEmpty: Nothing flagged as in-season this month.
home.availableSub: Most recent crop listings from cooperatives.
home.demandSub: Open demand — confirmed orders waiting to be filled.
home.calendarSub: When each crop is harvested across the year.

auth.title: Staff sign in
auth.subtitle: Committee, admin, and village representatives only. Farmers and buyers are onboarded by village reps.
auth.error: Sign-in failed. Check your email and password.

demand.title: Demand board
demand.subtitle: Confirmed buyer demand — grow with certainty.

prices.title: Committee price board
prices.subtitle: Monthly reference prices set by the cooperative committee.

farmers.subtitle: Members (farmers and buyers) you manage on the platform.
farmers.empty: No members yet. Add your first farmer or buyer above.

listings.subtitle: Listings you post on behalf of farmers you manage.
listings.empty: You haven't posted any listings yet.
listings.noFarmers: Add a farmer in 'My members' first, then come back to post a listing.

demandMy.subtitle: Demand posts on behalf of buyers you manage.
demandMy.empty: You haven't posted any demand yet.
demandMy.noBuyers: Add a buyer in 'My members' first, then come back to post demand.
